steps.title: Target the number contrast
steps.content: The student's goal is to contrast the number of haiku in two poems. The relevant notes say one poem contains five haiku and the other contains fifteen.

steps.title: Use the count comparison
steps.content: A discusses the collection's themes, C adds unsupported subject claims, and D only says both poems are in the same book. The needed choice directly compares the two counts, five versus fifteen, using whereas. The answer is B.
